/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -flto -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libparserutils.so.1 -o libparserutils.so.1 CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/input/filter.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/input/inputstream.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/aliases.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codec.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/encodings/utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/encodings/utf16.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codecs/codec_8859.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codecs/codec_ascii.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codecs/codec_ext8.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codecs/codec_utf16.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/charset/codecs/codec_utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/utils/buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/utils/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/utils/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/parserutils.dir/src/utils/errors.c.o
